title: Health Problems in PregnancyÂ | MedlinePlus
text:
provider for early detection and treatment of health problems. Sometimes, it's hard to know what's normal. Some symptoms, like nausea , back pain , and fatigue , are common during pregnancy, while other symptoms, like vaginal bleeding or a severe or long-lasting headache , can be signs of a problem. Call your provider to let them know if something is bothering or worrying you.
